nasb.text: “Now, why do you cry out loudly? Is there no king among you, Or has your counselor perished, That agony has gripped you like a woman in childbirth?

esv.text: Now why do you cry aloud? Is there no king in you? Has your counselor perished, that pain seized you like a woman in labor?

cnv.text: 現在你為甚麼大聲呼喊？ 難道你們中間沒有君王嗎？ 或是你的謀士滅亡了， 以致疼痛抓緊你，好像臨產的婦人呢？

ccb.text: 现在你为何大声哭喊？ 是因为你没有王吗？ 难道你的谋士都死了吗， 以致你像分娩的妇人一样痛苦不堪？
